title: erythronium pallidum
intro: Erythronium pallidum, also known as the pale yellow trout lily, is a species of flowering plant in the lily family (Liliaceae) native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The medicinal properties of Erythronium pallidum lie in its roots and bulbs, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help to alleviate respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. Traditionally, Erythronium pallidum is prepared as a tincture or infusion, and can be used in herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
